sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move player from [21,0] to [17,15] (yellow dot location)
# UP 4, RIGHT 15
moves = ['UP']*4 + ['RIGHT']*15
action(moves)

nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

print("After moving to [17,15]:")
for n in by_color['W']:
    print(f"  White: boundary={n['boundary']}")
for n in by_color['Y']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] > 5:
            print(f"  Yellow: bounds=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}] pixels={n['pixels']}")
        else:
            print(f"  Yellow dot: boundary={b}")
print(f"  Yellow dots count: {sum(1 for n in by_color['Y'] if n['pixels'] <= 1)}")

print(f"\nResult: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
